top_visual_formats: Official music video high production polish
dominant_emotion: Gritty authenticity with dramatic darkness—rap/hip-hop narrative tension dominates over pop euphoria
oversaturated: Major label official video drops with celebrity lifestyle framing; diss tracks and drama-driven virality; chart-safe pop ballads
hook_pattern_of_day: Artist Name + Single Title + [Official MV/Audio/Lyrics] format; supplemented by character-driven narrative titles (Bruce Wayne, Hooligan)
contrarian_gap: Spiritual/ritual production narratives absent—opportunity: minimal visual + sacred geometry sound design breakdowns, global folk-electronic fusion, non-English tribal narratives, ambient intro-to-drop storytelling (ritualistic journey arc)
